### III. | CLASSIFICATION: Recursive System Tagging

Every module will receive tags such as:

- FORMAT (Text, Audio, Visual, Hybrid)
- LOGIC MODE (Reality, Dream, Hybrid, Meta)
- OUTPUT TYPE (Artifact, Tool, Proof, Pitch)
- ACTIVE STATUS (Active, Incubating, Retired)
- COMMERCIAL USE (Internal, Public, For Sale, Open Source)

---

### IV. | CROSS-LINKED MODULES (TO BE DRAFTED IN PARALLEL)

Each sub-thread will become its own document + GitHub-ready file.
